✝️ Faith-Driven & Fort Worth Proud
What I Do

Airport Runs & Event Rides

I keep it simple and intentional. No surge pricing, no surprises — just a reliable, joyful ride when you need it most.

✈️

Airport Runs

DFW International and Dallas Love Field (Southwest Airlines). Drop-off and pickup. Same flat rate both ways — no surge, no guessing. Book by phone, ride with peace of mind.

🎸

Event & Concert Rides

Dickies Arena, Billy Bob's, Sundance Square, the Cultural District, and more. Fort Worth has a lot going on — let me get you there and back safely. Flat rates based on distance from 76110.

Flat Rates · No Surprises

Simple, Honest Pricing

DFW Airport
$80
Each Way · Same Rate Back
Love Field (Southwest)
$120
Each Way · Same Rate Back

All airport rides depart from the Fort Worth 76110 area. Return trips from the airport are the same flat rate. Book by phone — I'll confirm your pickup time personally.

All prices below are from the 76110 Medical District area to each destination. Flat rate each way.

More landmarks coming soon on the Weatherford side. Don't see your destination? Call me — I'll give you a flat quote on the spot.

All rides priced by distance from Fort Worth 76110. Flat rate — what you're quoted is what you pay.

It's Easy

How to Ride with Susy

1

Call to Book

No apps, no waitlists. Call Susy directly and she'll confirm your ride personally. Scheduling is handled by phone only.

2

Look for the Green Light

Susy will text you when she's close. Watch for the green beacon on the roof — that's your signal she's arrived.

3

Enjoy the Ride

Settle in, breathe easy, and enjoy a safe, joyful trip. Tips are welcome but never required.

📞 Call Now to Book Your Ride

You've Been in My Car?
Leave a Note! 💚

Every ride is a story. Drop a message below — I'd love to hear how you're doing!

Leave a Shoutout

Susy made my early morning airport run feel like a blessing. She prayed with me before I boarded and I landed with so much peace. I'll never forget it.
